name: 联机屏蔽 / MP Mod Hider + Vanilla Mode
author: 煎包 / Claude-4.6-opus
description:
Vanilla Mode: 欺骗服务端联机检测，与原版玩家联机
Vanilla Mode: Hide ALL mods from MP handshake to join vanilla players.
Individual eye icons per mod still work.

Eye Icon: Hide individual mods from MP mod list via eye icon in modding screen.
